title: HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING - 211info
text: HIV ALLIANCE DOUGLAS COUNTY HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential HIV and hepatitis C (HCV) testing. 647 W Luellen Drive Suite 3 Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Individuals considered to be high-risk for contracting HIV or HCV Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm Email (541) 342-5088 162 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 342-5088 ext 162 Toll-free (866) 470-3419 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: Suggested donation of $25; no one turned away for inability to pay DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-5pm Services: AIDS/HIV Prevention Counseling Hepatitis Testing HIV Testing Safe Sex Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - NEEDLE EXCHANGE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HIV+ CARE COORDINATION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ALLIANCE FOR COMMUNITY WELLNESS SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - HIV ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HIV ALLIANCE DOUGLAS COUNTY
